title: F048 — Love as Harmonic Coherence
caption: Dissonant waves become coherent through listening, repair, relation, and love.
surroundingTextPreview: Waves alternate between crest and trough. Breathing alternates between inhalation and exhalation. Life alternates between expansion and contraction. From a narrow perspective, positive and negative appear opposed. From a wider perspective, they are phases of one oscillation. Thus polarity is not necessarily ultimate separation. It may be phase distinction within deeper unity. F048 — Love as Harmonic CoherenceDissonant waves become coherent through listening, repair, relation, and love.F048-love-
